description: CompositionBlack mesh T-shirt made of 100% polyester Dri-Fit fabric, has a round neck with tape detailing on the inseam, short raglan sleeves with white piping on the seams, mesh panels on the sides, embroidered seal on the upper back neck and embroidered brand logo on the upper right chest FittingRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not bleach Tumble dry on lowCool iron onlyDo not dry cleanDo not iron on print or embroideryTake your training to the next level in this black T-shirt from nike. The mesh Dri-Fit fabric wicks sweat away to keep you cool and comfortable, while the sporty desing with the raglan sleeves gives an added edge. Team this with track pants and performance shoes.
